{{Quote|Destroying the base camps and killing Commander Malinth will open this planet up for corruption and lessen Imperial influence.|Urai Fen|<ref name="EAW:FOC" />}}
'''Malinth''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet Commander/Legends|Fleet Commander]] who was stationed on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] crime syndicate [[Skirmish on Honoghr|attacked]] Honoghr. Malinth's death lessened Imperial influence on the planet, allowing the criminal organization to gain a foothold in the region.

==Biography==
[[File:Honoghr_NEGAS.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Honoghr, the planet on which Malinth was stationed]]
Malinth was a [[Color/Legends|brown]]–[[Hair/Legends|haired]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="EAW:FOC" /> Around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> Malinth held the rank of [[Fleet Commander/Legends|Fleet Commander]] and was stationed on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] allied with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]], a criminal organization led by [[Tyber Zann]], tried to reestablish its previous dominance of the criminal underworld after the [[Ground Battle on Kessel|escape]] of their leader from the Imperial [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. To this end, the Consortium tried to get a foothold by gaining influence on Honoghr. Zann sent a team of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], including his second-in-command, [[Urai Fen]], to [[Skirmish on Honoghr|attack]] Honoghr and [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Malinth. Upon landing on the planet, Consortium [[Troop/Legends|troops]] engaged the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial]] and [[Noghri Death Commando|Noghri]] forces in battle, during which Malinth was killed. The Commander's death lessened the Imperial influence on the planet, allowing the Consortium to undermine the Imperial command on Honoghr.<ref name="EAW:FOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Malinth first appeared in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption|''Forces of Corruption'']], an expansion for the game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. While the player's object for the Honoghr mission is to kill Malinth, the game gives several choices how to eliminate him. In the game's [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|Prima guide]], the player is advised to kill Malinth by sending a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]] Urai Fen.
